title: PMN- 05 Culture of Human PMN - IL-8 production

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8u057","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5u37l","text":"- RPMI 1640: EuroCloneCatalog #ECM 0495L- 500 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"clgm1","text":"- Lipopolysaccharides from Escherichia coli O127:B8: SigmaCatalog # L3137","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2qcia","text":"- N-FORMYL-MET-LEU-PHE (fMLP): Sigma AldrichCatalog #F3506","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"36h1l","text":"- ELISA Kit for IL-8: InvitrogenCatalog # KHC0081","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8jnm9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ceom7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2q1lm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"pn9k","text":"Instrumentation needed ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"88ct4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e8rbv","text":"- Sterile and not sterile plastic disposable ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6mfgq","text":"- Laminar flow hood ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bok54","text":"- ELISA plate reader","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Isolate PMN according either to the protocol " PMN- 01a " or " PMN- 01b ".
Resuspend PMN at 10x10 6 cells/ml in complete culture medium ( SOLUTION- 13 ). SOLUTION- 13 - Complete culture medium by Farmacologia Medica
Use a number of tubes according to the experimental plan and to the substances to test.

Tubes will be prepared to test resting IL-8 production (substances alone) and stimulus-induced production. Add substances before the activation with stimulus (time selected according to the experiental plan)Stimulus: fMLP 0.1 μM or LPS 1 μM or other.
Incubate PMN at 37 °C for 03:00:00 in a 5 ml tubes for cell culture. Cells will be incubated in resting conditions or in presence of stimulus (point 3-4).
Centrifuge at 1500 x g, °C, 10 minutes Allegra AVANTI 30 (Centrifuge, Beckman Coulter, Beckman Italy)
Harvest cell-free supernatant using a pipette and cell pellet (for real-time assay of mRNA for IL-8).
Store the supernatant and cell pellet at -80°C until the IL-8 Enzyme Linked-ImmunoSorbent Assay (ELISA) and/or real time assay is performed.
creator: Farmacologia Medica
